CheckTitle: Detect service principals with overly broad delegated permission grants
Description: Identifies service principals that have been granted delegated permissions with all-inclusive scope strings such as full_access_as_user or .All variants through admin consent for all principals.
Risk: Overly broad delegated permission grants allow service principals to act on behalf of all users with extensive access. Combined with admin consent, this creates a powerful access token that attackers can abuse for lateral movement and data exfiltration.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review delegated permission grants and reduce scope to least-privilege. Replace overly broad grants (e.g., 'full_access_as_user') with specific scoped permissions. Limit admin consent to required scopes only.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
